description_long: This kiosk is a small, enclosed structure with three solid walls and an open front, designed to display and protect a historical artifact—a large, weathered cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with wheels. The kiosk features a dark, glossy floor and a combination of maroon and gray wall panels, with black trim along the tops of the walls. A glass display case is integrated into the left wall, providing a clear view of the cannon from the side, while a small angled sign stand is positioned near the front for informational purposes. The rear wall has a mounted 'EXIT' sign, and the right wall includes a small, framed display or control panel. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern kiosk with maroon and gray walls, black trim, and a glass display case showcasing a historic cannon on a wooden carriage. Features include a glossy floor, informational signage, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, cannon display, angled sign stand, and 'EXIT' sign on the rear wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass display case, cannon's profile, and the kiosk's interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the maroon wall and black trim, with no visible entry or display features.
description_view_3: Top-rear view showing the kiosk's roofline, wall arrangement, and partial visibility of the interior.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign above rear wall labeled 'EXIT', small angled printed sign at front left, small framed display or control panel on right wall
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular glass window on the left side
attribute_door_configuration: open front entryway, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with black trim, no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with functional display features
